name: Supreme/Minolta MN4K300WP Waterproof Camcorder
materialsAndDetails: Waterproof camcorder with custom logo application, 13MP CMOS sensor, 18x digital zoom, integrated 3 in. IPS LCD flip-out screen, UHD 4K video, 56MP still images, 128GB maximum storage, included 32GB microSD card, IPX7 waterproof up to 16 ft., and 1.72 lb. weight.
